blended.narrative: Blue Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
